tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def prs (github_pull_requests {:state "merged"}))
(def issues (linear_issues))
(def prs-with-linear (filter :closes_linear prs))
(def open-issues (filter #(not= "done" (:state %)) issues))
(def issue-ids (set (map :id open-issues)))
(def matches (filter #(contains? issue-ids (:closes_linear %)) prs-with-linear))

(def matches (filter #(some (fn [i] (= i (:closes_linear %))) issue-ids) prs-with-linear))
